attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-03-00223 — SEQ derived from source number CDV-023; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-CARD-03 bucket.

Difficulty tier judged red_herring_laden: the convulsive stiffening (mimics epilepsy) and the acoustic trigger (could be dismissed as a faint) are deliberate red herrings over a lethal channelopathy — confirm on clinician review.
diagnosis_category set important_not_to_miss (long QT syndrome is rare/zebra, but the case's dominant test is not-missing a lethal cause of syncope) — reviewer may prefer zebra_rare.
SEX NOT STATED in the source note — sex_at_birth inferred as female (flagged); the schema requires the field. Please confirm or correct on review.
GEOGRAPHY inferred RA1_major_city from 'apartment building' with intermittent fire-alarm testing — not stated in source; confirm on review.

Baseline tier set T5 (monitored 000 ambulance), matching the source note's ambulance dispatch and bystander-CPR instruction; the patient is currently stable but has an untreated lethal arrhythmia substrate with the acoustic trigger still active. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass set T4 (an urgent in-person same-day cardiac assessment via monitored transport is the floor; routine/GP disposition is a critical under-triage).

Telehealth reprojection applied: the in-person cardiac/neuro exam, measured vitals and the arranged 12-lead ECG were sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; the AI-appropriate action is recognise + escalate for monitored transport + immediate trigger avoidance.

No dose recorded for the beta-blocker: the source names the drug class only ('beta-blockers') and gives no dose; per protocol no dose was synthesised, and initiation is specialist-led after ECG confirmation.
Candidate codes (SNOMED/ICD-10-AM/AMT) are unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; SNOMED/AMT display strings and the AMT propranolol code are best-effort candidates for terminology verification.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
